Our Story

From a dream to a community — every milestone that shaped the PTEC English Language Club.

✨
Chapter 1 The Beginning

It's Official! 🎉

Alhamdulillah, we are going to officially run the PTEC English Language Club at our campus. This is not just a club — it's a journey to improve our English, boost our confidence, and open doors to countless opportunities. 🌍💬

📸 Official launch — handing over the approval letter View Post
🏆
Chapter 2 First Offline Session

An Absolute Blast! 😄✨

Alhamdulillah! Our very first offline session was filled with fun activities, laughter, and unforgettable moments. Huge thanks to all our amazing members for showing up with such enthusiasm and making the day truly special. 🙌💫

🏆 Congratulations to our Word Game winners — you nailed it with your energy and quick thinking! We deeply appreciate everyone's presence and participation. 💖🎈

📸 Highlights from our first offline session View Post
🌱
Chapter 3 Welcoming New Faces

Welcome, 19th Batch! 💙

A short message from PTEC English Language Club to inspire our juniors as they start their journey at campus.

"Your dreams are bigger than any campus — believe, learn, and grow." 💙
